title: Login Issues - Can't Access Account
description: Customer is unable to log in to their account. They've tried resetting their password multiple times but still cannot access the system.

title: Payment Failed During Checkout
description: User reports that payment fails at checkout even though card details are correct.

title: Bug in Dashboard Analytics
description: Graphs are not loading properly on the analytics dashboard.

title: Unable to Upload Profile Picture
description: Customer cannot upload a profile picture. The system shows an unknown error.

title: Email Notifications Not Working
description: User is not receiving email notifications for updates.

title: Account Suspended Without Notice
description: Customer claims their account was suspended without any prior notification.

title: Error 500 on Settings Page
description: Internal server error appears when accessing account settings.

title: Slow Loading Time
description: Application takes too long to load on mobile devices.

title: Password Reset Link Expired
description: Password reset link expires immediately after clicking.

title: Data Not Syncing Across Devices
description: Customer reports that data is not syncing between web and mobile apps.

title: Incorrect Billing Amount
description: User was charged twice for the same subscription.

title: Search Feature Not Working
description: Search results are not showing relevant items.

title: App Crashes on Startup
description: Mobile application crashes immediately after launch.

title: Two-Factor Authentication Issue
description: User is not receiving OTP for two-factor authentication.

title: Unable to Download Invoice
description: Invoice download button is not responding.
